rules.rationale: Margin level proxies pricing power and business model quality.
Stable margins indicate durable economics rather than one-off swings.
Scale correlates with resilience and institutional interest.

Ability to service debt from operating profit.

Returns on capital are the core of business quality compounding.

rules.evidence: CFO positive in 2/3 reported years (FY25: ₹87cr, FY24: ₹128cr, FY23: ₹-52cr)
rules.rationale: Operating cash positivity streak.
Profit that never becomes cash is the classic earnings-quality failure.
